checks.detail: Round306 181103 resources workbench marker is present.
Resource load status has an aria-live status region.
Resource loading, success, and error announcements are wired.
Student path routes resources to real exams and then knowledge/formula review.
181103 workbench links back to the 316/61 real-exam return path.
181103 surface now provides HTML content without raw downloads.
Visible resources HTML does not expose raw protected paths, protected raw URL fields, or local source labels.
Student path has tablet and mobile grid fallbacks.

acceptance.meaning: Resources page exposes a clearer 181103 study route without raw protected files, local paths, or download links.
